name: sqwr-standards-kit
description: Professional standards kit — 38 contracts, 13 audits, 11 agents, 9 skills, 21 hook scripts. Enables a solo developer with Claude Code to produce deliverables at the level of expert teams.
author: SQWR Studio

audit_threshold.description: Global minimum score threshold for SQWR audits (0-100)

org_name.description: Your organization name (used in audit reports and CLAUDE.md headers)

enable_agent_hooks.description: Enable SubagentStart/SubagentStop hooks for audit logging

eu_compliance.description: Enable EU compliance checks (EAA, GDPR, EU AI Act) — required for products serving EU users

risk_score_threshold.description: Minimum acceptable composite Risk Score — below this triggers a warning
